ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The file or folder to load snippets from. The file or folder must be within your vault, and not within a hidden folder (such as .obsidian/).
ast.target: \n\t\t\t要加载代码片段的文件或文件夹。该文件或文件夹必须位于您的保险库内，且不在隐藏文件夹中（例如 .obsidian/）。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: e.g. \\dot{x}^{2} + \\dot{y}^{2} will display as \u1E8B\xB2 + \u1E8F\xB2, and \\sqrt{ 1-\\beta^{2} } will display as \u221A{ 1-\u03B2\xB2 }.
ast.target: \n\t\t\t例如，\\\\dot{x}^{2} + \\\\dot{y}^{2} 将显示为 \\u1E8B\\xB2 + \\u1E8F\\xB2，而 \\\\sqrt{ 1-\\\\beta^{2} } 将显示为 \\u221A{ 1-\\u03B2\\xB2 }。\n\t\t

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The file or folder to load snippet variables from. The file or folder must be within your vault, and not within a hidden folder (such as .obsidian/).
ast.target: \n\t\t\t要加载代码片段变量的文件或文件夹。该文件或文件夹必须位于您的保险库内，且不在隐藏文件夹中（例如 .obsidian/）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Latex Suite: this plugin supports your IME keyboard, but
ast.target: LaTeX Suite：此插件支持您的输入法键盘，但

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: is currently enabled. You may want to disable it in the plugin settings to fully enable automatic snippets. Be aware that this may cause unexpected snippet triggers while using your IME. To turn this warning off, enable
ast.target: 当前已启用。您可能需要在插件设置中禁用它以完全启用自动代码片段。请注意，这可能会在您使用输入法时导致意外的代码片段触发。要关闭此警告，请启用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to insert newline and indent latex-suite-insert-newline-and-indent

ast.name: error
ast.target: 在工具提示中渲染数学公式时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter snippets here.  Remember to add a comma after each snippet, and escape all backslashes with an extra \. Lines starting with "//" will be treated as comments and ignored.
ast.target: 在此处输入代码片段。请记住在每个代码片段后添加逗号，并用额外的 \\ 转义所有反斜杠。以 \"//\" 开头的行将被视为注释并被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load snippets from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).
ast.target: 是否从指定文件或文件夹中的所有文件加载代码片段（而不是从插件设置中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否为匹配的括号着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the cursor is adjacent to a bracket, highlight the matching bracket.
ast.target: 当光标位于括号旁边时，高亮显示匹配的括号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to display the popup preview relative to the equation source.
ast.target: 相对于方程源代码显示弹出预览的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to highlight the area within the nearest pair of brackets around the cursor in the popup preview.
ast.target: 是否在弹出预览中高亮显示光标周围最近一对括号内的区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The fraction symbol to use in the replacement. e.g. \frac, \dfrac, \tfrac
ast.target: 替换中使用的分数符号。例如 \\frac, \\dfrac, \\tfrac

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of environments to exclude auto-fraction from running in. For example, to exclude auto-fraction from running while inside an exponent, such as e^{...}, use  ["^{", "}"]
ast.target: 要排除自动分数运行的环境列表。例如，要排除在指数内部（如 e^{...}）运行自动分数，请使用 [\"^{\", \"}\"]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of characters that denote the start/end of a fraction. e.g. if + is included in the list, "a+b/c" will expand to "a+\frac{b}{c}". If + is not in the list, it will expand to "\frac{a+b}{c}".
ast.target: 表示分数开始/结束的字符列表。例如，如果列表中包含 \"+\"，则 \"a+b/c\" 将展开为 \"a+\\frac{b}{c}\"。如果 \"+\" 不在列表中，则展开为 \"\\frac{a+b}{c}\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of environment names to run the matrix shortcuts in, separated by commas.
ast.target: 要运行矩阵快捷键的环境名称列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of closing brackets for tabout, separated by commas.
ast.target: 用于Tabout的右括号列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to automatically enlarge brackets containing e.g. sum, int, frac.
ast.target: 是否自动放大包含例如 sum、int、frac 的括号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of symbols that should trigger auto-enlarge brackets, separated by commas.
ast.target: 应触发自动放大括号的符号列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Assign snippet variables that can be used as shortcuts when writing snippets.
ast.target: 分配可在编写代码片段时用作快捷方式的代码片段变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load snippet variables from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).
ast.target: 是否从指定文件或文件夹中的所有文件加载代码片段变量（而不是从插件设置中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Symbols that will be treated as word delimiters, for use with the "w" snippet option.
ast.target: 将被视为单词分隔符的符号，用于 \"w\" 代码片段选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to remove trailing whitespaces when expanding snippets at the end of inline math blocks.
ast.target: 是否在行内数学块末尾展开代码片段时移除尾随空格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to also remove the closing $ when you delete the opening $ symbol inside blank inline math.
ast.target: 是否在删除空白行内数学中的开头 $ 符号时也移除结尾的 $。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to suppress snippets triggering when an IME is active.
ast.target: 是否在输入法激活时抑制代码片段触发。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Codeblock languages where the whole code block should be treated like a math block, separated by commas.
ast.target: 应将整个代码块视为数学块的代码块语言，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the level of debug information to log about snippet expansion. Set to "info" or "verbose" to help identify issues with snippet syntax or why a snippet is not expanding. Verbose mode will log most information to the developer console on debug level.
ast.target: 设置关于代码片段展开的调试信息日志级别。设置为 \"info\" 或 \"verbose\" 以帮助识别代码片段语法问题或代码片段未展开的原因。详细模式将在开发者控制台的调试级别记录大部分信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: turn on/off vim keybindings. Note vim needs to be enabled in obsidian itself.
ast.target: 开启/关闭Vim键绑定。请注意，Vim需要在Obsidian本身中启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
maps the key to switch from visual mode to select mode.
				 Keymap must be a vim keymap and can't contain any spaces. Use empty string to disable this feature.
				  (select mode=insert keybindings)
ast.target: 映射从可视模式切换到选择模式的按键。\n\t\t\t\t 键映射必须是Vim键映射且不能包含任何空格。使用空字符串禁用此功能。\n\t\t\t\t  （选择模式=插入键绑定）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
maps the key to the action of inserting a new line below while appending \\\\ to the current line in a matrix environment.
				 Use empty string to disable this feature.
ast.target: 映射在矩阵环境中，在当前行追加 \\\\\\\\ 的同时，在下方插入新行的操作按键。\n\t\t\t\t 使用空字符串禁用此功能。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Load snippets from file or folder
ast.target: 从文件或文件夹加载代码片段

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 代码片段文件或文件夹位置

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 高亮显示光标下方的匹配括号

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在预览中高亮显示括号

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Load snippet variables from file or folder
ast.target: 从文件或文件夹加载代码片段变量

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Snippet variables file or folder location
ast.target: 代码片段变量文件或文件夹位置

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove trailing whitespaces in snippets in inline math
ast.target: 移除行内数学公式中代码片段的尾随空格

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove closing $ when backspacing inside blank inline math
ast.target: 在空白行内数学公式内退格时移除闭合的 $

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Don't trigger snippets when IME is active
ast.target: 当输入法激活时不触发代码片段

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Code languages to interpret as math mode
ast.target: 解释为数学模式的代码语言

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Vim: Switch from visual mode to select mode
ast.target: Vim: 从可视模式切换到选择模式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Vim: Switch from select mode to visual mode
ast.target: Vim: 从选择模式切换到可视模式

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Make equations more readable by hiding LaTeX syntax and instead displaying it in a pretty format.
ast.target: 通过隐藏 LaTeX 语法并以美观格式显示，使方程更易读。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: LaTeX beneath the cursor will be revealed.
ast.target: 光标下的 LaTeX 将被显示。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Disabled by default to not confuse new users. However, I recommend turning this on once you are comfortable with the plugin!
ast.target: 默认禁用以避免新用户困惑。不过，一旦您熟悉了该插件，我建议开启此功能！

ast.name: setText
ast.source: How long to delay the reveal of LaTeX for, in milliseconds, when the cursor moves over LaTeX. Defaults to 0 (LaTeX under the cursor is revealed immediately).
ast.target: 当光标移过 LaTeX 时，延迟显示 LaTeX 的时间（以毫秒为单位）。默认为 0（立即显示光标下的 LaTeX）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Can be set to a positive number, e.g. 300, to delay the reveal of LaTeX, making it much easier to navigate equations using arrow keys.
ast.target: 可以设置为正数，例如 300，以延迟 LaTeX 的显示，从而更轻松地使用方向键导航方程。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: When inside an equation, show a popup preview window of the rendered math.
ast.target: 在方程内时，显示渲染数学公式的弹出预览窗口。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The popup preview will be shown for all inline math equations, as well as for block math equations in Source mode.
ast.target: 弹出预览将显示所有行内数学方程，以及源代码模式下的块数学方程。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [tabout] Found right command without following delimiter:
ast.target: [tabout] 找到右侧命令但没有后续分隔符：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Advanced settings > Don't trigger snippets when IME is active
ast.target: 高级设置 > 当输入法激活时不触发代码片段

ast.name: text
ast.target: 高级设置 > 抑制输入法警告
